title: Potato Ducks
description: Mod that adds ducks and special potatoes.
body:
**Potato Duck's**: Potato Ducks Spawn Randomly Along Rivers When Killed They Drop Throwable Potato's. If Attacked They Will Throw Potatos At You.

![Potato Duck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8bc48695070adfcc472f5218cc0156a854ec32d.png)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Throwable Potato's**: Throwable Potatos Can Be Thrown And Different Types Of Throwable Potatos Do Different Things.
